programme.title: Hey Arnold!
programme.desc: Harold decides that he hates school and wants nothing else to do with it. But when he gets suspended and can find nothing to do at home, he tries everything he can to go back. Ernie falls in love with a beautiful magazine model.

programme.title: Hey Arnold!
programme.desc: Arnold pays his cousin Arnie a visit and it turns out to be much like being in The Twilight Zone. Wolfgang tells Chocolate Boy that if he can go two weeks without chocolate, he'll give him ten pounds of chocolate.

programme.desc: Helga drops her journal full of love poems about Arnold into a pile of books./ Arnold's class goes on a field trip to the aquarium where Arnold waits to see Lockjaw.

programme.desc: Helga tries to hide her disappointment at not being invited to Rhonda's makeover party. She gives herself her own makeover and crashes the party with the neighborhood boys in tow, trying to out girlie-girl everyone else at the party.

programme.desc: Nearburg becomes a winter wonderland, and CatDog, Lola, Dunglap, Mervis, and the Greasers take the opportunity to sled and frolic in the snow. Dog gets a toy hypnotism kit, and Cat uses it to hypnotize Winslow.

programme.desc: Dog builds his own Monster Truck and drags Cat to Nearburg Square Garden to enter the Monster Truck Rally. Lola convinces CatDog to make honey in their own backyard.

programme.title: Black Ink Crew

programme.title: Black Ink Crew

programme.title: Black Ink Crew

programme.title: Black Ink Crew

programme.title: Black Ink Crew
programme.desc: Ceaser got caught cheating on Dutchess and he needs his brother Ty's help getting his things from her apartment. Dutch confides in Sky, putting Sky's loyalty to Ceaser to the test. O S**t asks Puma to accompany him ring shopping. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: Black Ink Crew

programme.title: Black Ink Crew

programme.title: Black Ink Crew

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: La UAC presenta uno de los casos más longevos de un asesino en serie a unos estudiantes universitarios, y llevan la clase a través de los 20 años en los que persiguieron al asesino.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: Jimmy se debate entre la familia y el trabajo después de que su suegro, Ed, le pide que manipule las pruebas de la actual investigación de asesinato del NCIS.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: Director Vance es notificado por el Pentágono que el submarino nuclear Gibbs y Bishop están a bordo para llevar a cabo una investigación de asesinato ha quedado radio en silencio.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: Torres confía en las habilidades de investigación de su equipo después de que se despierta en un barco de pesca en ruinas, cubierto de sangre e incapaz de recordar las últimas 12 horas.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: Después de un bloqueo de un tirador activo en un hospital naval, el equipo del NCIS busca a un sospechoso que huyó de la escena.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Buen policía, mal policía
programme.desc: Danny y Baez investigan el asesinato de una anciana por una bala perdida. Mientras, Frank es ridiculizado por disciplinar a un policía irrespetuoso y Erin ayuda a su detective Anthony.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Por la comunidad
programme.desc: Erin y Anthony intentan evitar la deportación de la activista comunitaria Coryna Garza (Judy Reyes), quien no es ciudadana, y Frank debe decidir si el NYPD participará en la redada de alto perfil de los Marshals de EE. UU. contra una pandilla local.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): El delator
programme.desc: Mientras Frank se enfrenta a un denunciante de la policía de Nueva York que afirma tener pruebas de abuso de poder en la organización, Danny y Báez investigan el caso de una mujer que fue atropellada por un coche en circunstancias sospechosas.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Culpable por asociación
programme.desc: Cuando un testigo clave en el caso de Danny es asesinado justo antes de testificar, Erin enfurece a Danny al pedirle ayuda a Anthony (Steve Schrippa) para encontrar al asesino.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Después de un asesino en serie es ejecutado en Oklahoma, un imitador aparece y los agentes del FBI son llamados para encontrarlo. Al mismo tiempo, Prentiss se pone nerviosa pensando en una importante compra inmobiliaria.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: La UAC presenta uno de los casos más longevos de un asesino en serie a unos estudiantes universitarios, y llevan la clase a través de los 20 años en los que persiguieron al asesino.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Cuando una banda de ladrones de bancos inicia su último robo en un banco de Washington D.C., la UAC intenta negociar los rehenes con los ladrones, pero las apuestas comienzan a elevarse cuando uno de los suyos se convierte en rehén.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Mientras la UAC continua persiguiendo a los ladrones, el equipo determina que los sospechosos tienen un objetivo más grande en D.C., y con uno del equipo como rehén, tienen que trabajar rápidamente para desactivar una situación explosiva.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: Después de un bloqueo de un tirador activo en un hospital naval, el equipo del NCIS busca a un sospechoso que huyó de la escena.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Police pursue a car wanted in connection to a shooting. Stop Sticks end a chase involving a dually truck. Deputies help a suspect with a warrant by gathering his laundry before heading to jail.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A bicyclist with a warrant pedals into the desert to avoid Deputies. Surveillance cameras identify suspects in a beer run. A man in love struggles with his girlfriend's addictive behavior.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A suspect resisting arrest tells Officers he has a gun in his waist pack. Deputies chase a man on a bike into a backyard. A man tosses car keys on the roof to keep his girlfriend from leaving.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A suspect wanted for brandishing a knife squares up with Officers. A passenger learns the hard way that a friend offered him a ride in a stolen Jeep. A young driver is caught with magic mushrooms.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A driver believes Officers 'cheated' by using Stop Sticks to end a pursuit. A man making threats at a gas station is caught with his pants down. A suspect caught with meth claims he is a video judge.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers arrest a man suspected of robbery. A riot erupts at a juvenile party on the beach. Officers find an intoxicated man stuck on an iron fence.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A woman claims a man abused her then put a curse on her. Police arrest a man for having illegal drugs on him. An elderly woman locks herself in the restroom at a bank.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Two cousins fight over a five dollar debt. Police arrest a man for domestic violence. A taxi cab driver is robbed and shot.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Police arrest a suspect for armed robbery. A six foot alligator is found on a homeowner's back porch. An Officer assists in an undercover sting.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Two suspects hit a car with their U-Haul truck. A suspect flees on foot after a car pursuit. An elderly man is selling fake jewelry.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Undercover Officers organize a buy-bust sting. Racoons hide out in a woman's chimney. A man gets pulled over for soliciting a prostitute.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Undercover Vice Officers pose as drug dealers in an illegal drug transaction. A man is pulled over and arrested for driving a stolen vehicle. Three men are caught robbing a coin machine.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Police have a breakthrough in a burglary case, a man found with drugs in his pants claims the pants are not his, and officers deal with a familiar domestic disturbance call.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man is captured after appearing on an episode of "America's Most Wanted". An Officer detains a man for drug possession. Officers serve a search warrant and find four suspects with narcotics in their home.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers stop a suspicious pedestrian, police and their K-9 dog search for weapons in a suspect's vehicle, and a wanted woman is stopped on a moped with her pet dog.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: When officers approach, a suspect flees into a fast-food restaurant. A driver takes his granny's wheels for a dangerous spin with cops in pursuit. Sheriffs catch up to a man who fled the scene of a possible domestic battery.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man can’t handle that his van is getting repossessed. An Uncle finds his nephew has been hiding all kinds of secrets. Past lovers find their old wounds have yet to heal.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: An intoxicated man suspected of domestic abuse refuses to obey deputies' orders, police find drugs in a woman's car, and an alleged prostitute encounters the police.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Police investigate an attempted residential robbery that turned deadly. Officers visit a residence to find a suspect facing warrant charges. A high-speed chase comes to an end when the suspect crashes into a fence.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Carjacking victims flag down officers whom then locate, pursue and acquire the stolen vehicle, and a man admits to officers the car he's driving is stolen.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man involved in a drug deal claims he works for the task force. An irate woman slams the front door when officers arrive. Police pull over two young suspects in an area known for drug activity.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A dangerous pursuit between Officers and a known meth dealer ends in an arrest. A suspect with several felony warrants is apprehended without incident. A pursuit involving a stolen motorcycle exceeds speeds of 100mph.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A suspect seen fleeing a vehicle refuses to admit he was ever in said vehicle, and police respond to a call that shots were fired.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A loitering suspect flees when approached by police, and a traffic stop leaves a woman concerned for the future of her marriage.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A suspect tries to ditch his stash in a laundromat, a nervous driver arouses suspicion, and a woman returning home from a night out finds her boyfriend has changed the locks.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers respond to a call that a man shot up his parents' house, a fleeing suspect hopes a change of clothes will fool the police, and a shaky hit-and-run story unravels.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man gets Tased while resisting arrest, police interrupt a transaction going down in a parked vehicle, and a man fired from his job vents his anger at a gas station.

programme.title: Chocolate
programme.desc: Johnny Depp y Juliette Binoche protagonizan esta comedia romántica dulce y sexi que enamoró al público y ganó 5 nominaciones al Óscar(r), incluso Mejor Película, que se centra en una chocolatería en un pequeño pueblo francés.

programme.title: Ghost: la sombra del amor
programme.desc: Patrick Swayze encarna a un fantasma que se alía con una psíquica (Whoopi Goldberg) para desenmascarar la verdad detrás de su asesinato y rescatar a su amor (Demi Moore) de un destino similar.

programme.title: Señales de amor
programme.desc: En el transcurso de una noche mágica, Jonathan (John Cusack) y Sara (Kate Beckinsale) se conocen de manera inesperada, luego cada uno se va por su lado, dejando que el destino guíe su futuro, si es que se supone que terminen juntos.

programme.title: Otoño en Nueva York
programme.desc: El exitoso playboy Will (Richard Gere) nunca ha pensado seriamente en el compromiso hasta que conoce a Charlotte (Winona Ryder). A medida que su relación se convierte en algo maravilloso, ambos se dan cuenta de que este amor podría durar toda la vida...

programme.title: La mujer de mi hermano
programme.desc: Zoe e Ignacio llevan 10 años casados y la pasión se ha enfriado. Una Zoe sexualmente frustrada se siente físicamente atraída por su cuñado. Las cosas se complican aún más después de que ella queda embarazada y descubre que su esposo puede ser gay.

programme.title: Señuelo de divorcio
programme.desc: Una ama de casa suburbana felizmente casada publica un mensaje falso en las redes sociales diciendo que se está divorciando, solo para ver cuál de sus amigas intentará robarle el marido.

programme.title: Cantinflas
programme.desc: Cantinflas es la historia jamás contada de la mayor y más adorada estrella mexicana de la comedia de todos los tiempos.

programme.title: Mississippi en llamas
programme.desc: Dos agentes del FBI de aspecto muy diferente llegan a Mississippi para investigar la desaparición de algunos defensores de los derechos civiles.

programme.title: Los siete magníficos
programme.desc: Hombres armados son contratados para proteger un pueblo mexicano de un grupo de bandidos en esta adaptación de “Seven Samurai” de Kurosawa.

programme.title: Vuelven los siete magníficos
programme.desc: Un noble pistolero (George Kennedy) contrata a una brigada formada por los hombres más peligrosos del oeste para liberar a un líder revolucionario de los campesinos de una importante prisión mexicana en este clásico del oeste.

programme.title: El regreso de los siete magnificos
programme.desc: Protagonizada por Yul Brynner y con un reparto estelar que incluye a Robert Fuller, Warren Oates y Claude Akins, este western de aventuras sigue a los siete magníficos hasta México, donde se enfrentarán al duelo de sus vidas.

programme.title: El desafío de los siete magníficos
programme.desc: El jefe de 'Los Siete Magníficos' es ahora el sheriff de una pequeña ciudad. Cuando su 'tranquilidad' es destruida por el asesinato de su esposa, acepta una misión: rescatar a un grupo de mujeres de unos bandidos con la ayuda de cinco duros convictos.

programme.title: Las fuerzas vivas
programme.desc: En un pueblo aislado se recibe la noticia de que ha estallado la revolución. Los dos partidos políticos que regentan la ciudad aprovechen para hacer campaña en favor de sus intereses.

programme.title: Juana Gallo
programme.desc: La verdadera historia de Angela Ramos una joven campesina que llegó a ser la cabeza de una guerrilla que lucho exitosa-mente contra las fuerzas federales del usurpador Victoriano Huerta. El pueblo la llamó por su fiereza “Juana Gallo”.

programme.title: Atrápame si puedes
programme.desc: Dirigida por Steven Spielberg y protagonizada por Leonardo DiCaprio y Tom Hanks, narra la historia real de Frank Abagnale Jr., quien antes de los 19 años estafó millones haciéndose pasar por piloto, médico y fiscal.

programme.title: Desapareció una noche
programme.desc: La desaparición de una niña en un peligroso vecindario de Boston, une a dos detectives privados con la policía en este fascinante misterio.

programme.title: El matador
programme.desc: Un asesino a sueldo que recorre el mundo entabla una inesperada amistad con un vendedor tras encontrarse en un bar de hotel en la Ciudad de México.

programme.title: Barrio chino
programme.desc: Jakes Gittes, investigador privado, revela una red de escándalos personales y políticos cuando es contratado por una hermosa mujer de alta sociedad para investigar las relaciones extramatrimoniales de su esposo.

programme.title: Sospecha Mortal
programme.desc: Richard Gere es Peck, y Andy Garcia es Raymond Avila, un investigador decidido a llevar a Peck a la justicia en este thriller policial emocionante.

programme.title: Ley criminal
programme.desc: El abogado Ben Chase (Gary Oldman) defiende con éxito a un hombre rico, Martin Thiel (Kevin Bacon), en un juicio por un asesinato en serie de alto nivel, pero cuando se da cuenta de que Thiel es culpable comienza una tensa persecución.

programme.title: El vuelo
programme.desc: Un piloto logra evitar que un vuelo se estrelle, pero la investigación del fallo revela algo inquietante.

programme.title: Gladiador
programme.desc: Traicionado por el imperio, un general romano cae en la esclavitud y se alza como gladiador para vengar a su familia. Dirigida por Ridley Scott y protagonizada por Russell Crowe, ganó 5 premios Oscar, incluido a mejor película.

programme.title: Bailando con lobos
programme.desc: Enviado para proteger un puesto fronterizo de Estados Unidos, el teniente John Dunbar se hace amigo de aquellos que él pensaba que tenía que temerle, los indios Sioux.

programme.title: El salvaje Bill
programme.desc: El inicio de la carrera de Wild Bill Hickock como un legendario hombre de leyes y culmina en su reubicación en Deadwood, donde se produce el reencuentro con Calamity Jane.

programme.title: Frontera hostil
programme.desc: Luego de ser deportada, Claudia debe elegir entre reconciliarse con su padre, de quien está distanciada, o juntarse con un peligroso contrabandista para poder volver a Estados Unidos.

programme.title: Mente indomable
programme.desc: El exitoso drama ganador del Óscar, que lanzó las carreras de Matt Damon y Ben Affleck, cuenta la historia de un genio de clase obrera obstinado a quien no le va bien en la vida, hasta que conoce a un profesor de psicología cercano (Robin Williams).

programme.title: Rambo III
programme.desc: Rambo se rehúsa a unirse a su amigo y antiguo mentor, el coronel Trautman en una misión en Afganistán. La misión falla y Trautman es capturado por tropas rusas. Ahora Rambo debe infiltrarse a la fortaleza rusa y salvar a su único amigo.

programme.title: Rambo: Primera Sangre
programme.desc: El veterano de la guerra de Vietnam, John J. Rambo, vaga a una pequeña ciudad de Washington en busca de su viejo amigo, pero se encuentra con la intolerancia y brutalidad del aguacil, Will Teasle.

programme.title: Rambo II: la misión
programme.desc: John Rambo is enviado a una misión al sureste de Asia para rastrear a unos prisioneros de guerra, pero termina enfrentando a soldados vietnamitas que resguardan los campos.

programme.title: Rambo III
programme.desc: Rambo se rehúsa a unirse a su amigo y antiguo mentor, el coronel Trautman en una misión en Afganistán. La misión falla y Trautman es capturado por tropas rusas. Ahora Rambo debe infiltrarse a la fortaleza rusa y salvar a su único amigo.

programme.title: 13 ASESINOS
programme.desc: Un ingenuo joven adopta la identidad de un hombre muerto para unirse a un juego de mafiosos de ruleta rusa. Con Mickey Rourke, Jason Statham y Michael Shannon.

programme.title: El yakuza americano
programme.desc: Viggo Mortensen (Green Book) interpreta a un agente del FBI encubierto que ha ascendido en las filas de la Yakuza y ahora se ve atrapado en una guerra entre la Yakuza, la mafia y el FBI.

programme.title: Los últimos caballeros
programme.desc: Clive Owen protagoniza esta épica aventura del arte de pelear con espadas, un guerrero caído que lucha para vengar a su deshonrado maestro (Morgan Freeman).

programme.title: 13 ASESINOS
programme.desc: Un ingenuo joven adopta la identidad de un hombre muerto para unirse a un juego de mafiosos de ruleta rusa. Con Mickey Rourke, Jason Statham y Michael Shannon.

programme.title: Sonic: La película
programme.desc: El mundo necesitaba un héroe, y nos llegó un erizo. Dotado de una velocidad sobrehumana, Sonic corre para salvar el mundo y evitar que el malvado genio Dr. Robotnik domine el mundo.

programme.title: A.I. Inteligencia artificial
programme.desc: En un mundo futuro, los humanos comparten aspectos de su vida con robots de compañía llamados "Mechas". Pero cuando un prototipo de niño-robot llamado David es programado para demostrar amor incondicional..

programme.title: Inmersión letal
programme.desc: Paul Walker y Jessica Alba esperan pasar unos momentos inolvidables buceando, pero se meten en un lío con un traficante cuando encuentran la carga ilícita de un avión hundido en este thriller submarino lleno de acción y sorpresas.

programme.title: Azul extremo 2: El arrecife
programme.desc: Una pareja de europeos de clase alta (David Anders y Marsha Thomason) contrata a Sebastian (Chris Carmack), un buceador profesional, y a su novia aspirante a cazatesoros (Laura Vandervoort) para recuperar un tesoro hundido.

programme.title: A.I. Inteligencia artificial
programme.desc: En un mundo futuro, los humanos comparten aspectos de su vida con robots de compañía llamados "Mechas". Pero cuando un prototipo de niño-robot llamado David es programado para demostrar amor incondicional..

programme.title: Bob Esponja, la película
programme.desc: Él es la loca estrella submarina de un océano lleno de aventuras, él es Bob Esponja en su debut en la película original!

programme.title: La mujer de mis pesadillas
programme.desc: Ben Stiller personifica a Eddie, el soltero empedernido de 40 años que finalmente da el "sí" a la hermosa Lila. Pero durante la luna de miel, la mujer de sus sueños resulta ser una completa pesadilla.

programme.title: Zoolander
programme.desc: Derek Zoolander, quien ha sido modelo del año tres veces, está devastado después de perder su título ante el novato Hansel. Luego de esa noticia, el imperio de la moda de Mugatu le lava el cerebro a Derek para transformarlo en un asesino.

programme.title: Zoolander 2
programme.desc: Las personas más bellas del mundo están en peligro, y los exmodelos Derek y Hansel participan en una misión secreta para derrotar a Mugatu, el genio criminal. Prepárense para una aventura peligrosamente alucinante, donde las miradas matan de verdad.

programme.title: Golpe bajo: El juego final
programme.desc: La historia de un mariscal de campo profesional, ex campeón universitario, y entrenador, a quien se le pide reunir un equipo de fútbol americano de presos para enfrentar a los guardias mientras se encuentran en prisión.

programme.title: El golpe bajo: El juego final
programme.desc: Eddie Albert es el guardián sádico que con gusto hará cualquier sacrificio para llevar al equipo de fútbol semiprofesional de sus guardias a un campeonato nacional.

programme.title: Una noche sin luna
programme.desc: Durante la víspera del Año Nuevo, tres personajes solitarios viajan a una pequeña ciudad perdida en el campo uruguayo y, a través de sus caminos, tendrán la oportunidad de cambiar sus destinos.

programme.title: Tómalo con calma
programme.desc: John Travolta regresa como Chili Palmer en esta película, así que "Tómalo con calma". Con un reparto lleno de estrellas como Uma Thurman y The Rock, esta película cuenta la cómica historia de un mafioso que quiere ser un gigante de la música.

programme.title: Duplex
programme.desc: Los jóvenes y vibrantes neoyorquinos Alex y Nancy encontraron un lugar perfecto para establecerse y compartir un futuro brillante: la planta baja de un hermoso y viejo dúplex. Pero su nuevo hogar viene con un accesorio permanente que no esperaban.

programme.title: Cantinflas
programme.desc: Cantinflas es la historia jamás contada de la mayor y más adorada estrella mexicana de la comedia de todos los tiempos.

programme.title: Casese Quien Pueda
programme.desc: The best-laid love plans go hilariously awry in this romantic-comedy hit about two sisters (Martha and Miriam Higareda) who find themselves in uncharted romantic territory.

programme.title: El Infierno (LAS)
programme.desc: Benny has been deported from the United States back to a Mexico that is being ripped apart by warring drug cartels. He gets involved in the narco business and begins to rocket up through the ranks, and is surrounded by money, women, violence, and fun.

programme.title: Cómo cortar a tu patán
programme.desc: Amanda, una terapeuta especializada en ayudar a las mujeres a terminar las relaciones destructivas, vive lejos de los hombres y del compromiso. Dedicada al trabajo y la protección de su hermana Natalia.

programme.title: Havana Motor Club LAS
programme.desc: El cambio es correr por las calles de La Habana, donde los mejores corredores de arrastre subterráneos de Cuba luchan por preparar sus clásicos hot rods para la primera carrera oficial de autos desde la Revolución.

programme.title: Gloria
programme.desc: Una despreocupada mujer mayor descubre algo inesperado después de una breve aventura con un oficial naval retirado que conoció en un club nocturno.

programme.title: Compadres
programme.desc: Un policía mexicano y un joven americano hacker de computadores, unen fuerzas para entregar un criminal a la justicia en esta comedia de acción llena de altas emociones y risas escandalosas.

programme.title: De amor y monstruos
programme.desc: En un mundo lleno de monstruos, Joel (Dylan O’Brien) se entera de que su amor de la secundaria (Jessica Henwick) está a 130 kilómetros. Ahora, deberá sacar a su héroe interior y enfrentar peligros desconocidos para estar con la mujer de sus sueños.

programme.title: EL Ojo (2008)
programme.desc: Una chica ciega recibe un trasplante de córnea para poder recuperar la vista. Sin embargo, recibe más de lo que esperaba cuando se da cuenta de que puede ver inquietantes fantasmas.

programme.title: Cazador de demonios
programme.desc: Un maldito pistolero (Wesley Snipes) cuyas víctimas regresan de entre los muertos, recluta a un joven guerrero para ayudar en la lucha contra una banda de zombies.

programme.title: Cementerio maldito
programme.desc: Basada en la aterradora novela de Stephen King. Después de que la familia Creed se muda a la zona rural de Maine, se topan con un antiguo cementerio con poderes siniestros.

programme.title: Los domésticos
programme.desc: Un matrimonio busca refugio en un mundo apocalíptico controlado por malvadas pandillas. Una de estas depravadas pandillas pone a la pareja en la mira, por lo que ellos harán lo que sea para sobrevivir.

programme.title: Especies
programme.desc: Un experimento genético genera a una hermosa mujer mutante que amenaza a la raza humana.

programme.title: La maldición
programme.desc: En este thriller apasionante y sobrenatural con las estrellas más populares de Hollywood, un temor del estudio crece hasta convertirse en una vertiginosa pesadilla para un profesor y tres sujetos atrapados en una mansión misteriosa.

programme.title: High Noon
programme.desc: Gary Cooper won the Oscar for the Best Actor in this classic tale of a lawman who stands alone to defend a town of cowardly citizens against a gang of revenge-seeking criminals.

programme.title: Hang 'Em High
programme.desc: Clint Eastwood stars in this brazen tale about a rampaging band of vigilantes who make two mistakes: they hang the wrong man and they don't finish the job. Inger Stevens, Pat Hingle, Bruce Dern & Dennis Hopper co-star in this action-packed western.

programme.title: The Unforgiven
programme.desc: John Huston directs Audrey Hepburn in this thrilling, romantic western about a woman who becomes the target of lawless racism and brutality when it is discovered that she was born to the Kiowa tribe but secretly adopted by a white frontier family.

programme.title: Sioux City Sue
programme.desc: A talent scout searches for a cowboy singer to do the voice for a cartoon character happens upon Gene Autry, who reluctantly takes the job, not knowing he is to be the voice of an animated donkey!

programme.title: Robin Hood Of Texas
programme.desc: Gene Autry and the Cass County Boys are unjustly arrested as bank bandits. Released by police as decoys to locate the loot, Gene and the boys find themselves in trouble with the real bank robbers.

programme.title: Saddle Pals
programme.desc: Gene Autry goes to the home of hypochondriac landowner, who gets Gene to switch identities while he takes a vacation, giving Gene power-of-attorney. Gene has to raise $50,000 to save the properties.

programme.title: The Gunfight at Dodge City
programme.desc: Seeking a fresh start, Bat Masterson (Joel McCrea) rolls into Dodge City with a chip on his shoulder and a gun on his hip. But soon, his mysterious past will catch up with him when an old friend calls in a favor...one that might cost him his life!

programme.title: Along Came Jones
programme.desc: Gary Cooper gives a marvelous, tongue-in-cheek performance as a fumble-fingered cowpoke who is mistaken for a notorious bandit and almost gets killed by both sides of the law...all while managing to capture the attention of Loretta Young.

programme.title: Donovan's Reef
programme.desc: Acclaimed director John Ford and screen legend John Wayne team up for what would be their final collaboration in this boisterous, rowdy South Seas escapade.

programme.title: The Man Who Shot Liberty Valance
programme.desc: Jimmy Stewart plays the bungling but charming big-city lawyer determined to rid the fair village of Shinbone of its number one nuisance and bad man: Liberty Valance.

programme.title: The Quiet Man
programme.desc: An American ex-boxer returns to Ireland to win the hand of a spirited young woman. He is confronted by local customs and the woman's belligerent brother. Set in the verdant Irish countryside, this film has beautiful scenery and local charm.

programme.title: Sayonara
programme.desc: Marlon Brando stars as an Air Force Major who faces prejudice when he falls in love with a Japanese actress while stationed in Japan. Winner of 4 Academy Awards® including Best Supporting Actor and Actress nods to Red Buttons and Miyoshi Umeki .

programme.title: Run Silent, Run Deep
programme.desc: The legendary Clark Gable and Burt Lancaster star in this gripping, classic military drama as a submarine commander (Gable) drives his men and his 1st officer (Lancaster) to the brink of mutiny in his quest to sink an enemy sub. Robert Wise directs.

programme.title: The Pink Panther (1964)
programme.desc: In this riotously funny farce, Peter Sellers introduced the world to Jacques Clouseau, the clumsiest Inspector ever to trip over a case, who is out to stop the notorious Phantom (David Niven) from stealing the priceless Pink Panther diamond!

programme.title: Maude
programme.desc: Maude is thunderstruck when the Ethiopian foster child she's supported for 20 years comes to America and turns out to be quite different from what she expected.

programme.title: Maude
programme.desc: When Maude and Vivian go back to college for their thirty-year reunion, Vivian wants to go back in time and do it all over again -- this time without her husband Arthur.

programme.title: Maude
programme.desc: When Carol's beguiling ex-husband suddenly turns on the charm and captivates the Findlay household, Maude and Carol are astounded to discover his motives.

programme.title: All in the Family
programme.desc: Mike and Gloria worry about Archie's sudden disappearance while on his way to a union convention in Buffalo.

programme.title: All in the Family
programme.desc: After discovering that Archie is missing, Edith goes down to the police station with Mike to file a missing persons report. Mike discovers a photo of Archie with another woman. This leads him to believe that Archie may have run off with another woman.

programme.title: All in the Family
programme.desc: Edith has news that Archie finally called home to let everyone know where he was. Supposedly he got sidetracked to a podiatrists' convention in Rochester.

programme.title: All in the Family
programme.desc: With Archie out on strike, household funds have begun to dwindle, leaving Edith in a touch position trying to balance the little household income that is coming in. Tempers flare as Archie finds himself with nothing to do but sit around the house.

programme.title: All in the Family
programme.desc: With Archie still on strike, Edith decides to go out and try to get a job. Louise comes to her rescue offering her a job working in one of George's cleaning stores. However, Archie refuses to take charity and tries to get Edith to turn the offer down.

programme.title: All in the Family
programme.desc: Archie begins to feel like the odd man out, with everyone working in the family except him. Meanwhile, negotiations continue with Archie's union but Archie doesn't realize that the negotiations will leave him worse off than before the strike began.

programme.title: All in the Family
programme.desc: One of Mike's graduate school friends, Stuart, comes over one evening for a visit and Gloria begins to feel like an intellectual outcast.

programme.title: All in the Family
programme.desc: Archie and Edith are kept up all night with the sounds of an argument coming from the Jeffersons home. This soon leads to Lionel temporarily moving in with the Bunkers after George refuses to allow his son to marry a girl who has a white father.

programme.title: All in the Family
programme.desc: Irene has been job hunting and in her spare time, she has been spending time at her women's club with Edith. Not pleased that Edith has been at the women's club, Archie decides to help Irene get a job at his company.

programme.title: All in the Family
programme.desc: Yet another argument erupts between Archie and Mike about the nation and its problems, Mike states that he does not want children. This takes Gloria by surprise and leads to an even bigger argument between Mike and Gloria.

programme.title: All in the Family
programme.desc: Edith stops by the Jeffersons home to say goodbye to her dear friend, Louise. It seems that George his struck it big with his dry cleaning business and has decided to 'move on up to the East side, to a deluxe apartment in the sky.'

programme.title: All in the Family
programme.desc: While at work, Archie is in a near fatal accident when a large crate nearly crushes him. This near death experience leads Archie to suddenly become a devout if somewhat hypocritical churchgoer.

programme.title: Maude
programme.desc: Arthur is determined to teach his visiting grandson the important things in life, but it's the guilty grandpa who learns the most valuable lesson of all.

programme.title: Maude
programme.desc: When Victoria Butterfield's self-righteous father comes to take her away from the 'permissive' Findlay household, Maude confronts him with his less-than-honorable secret. Roscoe Lee Browne returns in the guest star role of Mr. Butterfield.

programme.title: Maude
programme.desc: Maude's grandson Phillip is devastated when he finally finds out the real reason why an 'older woman' has been dating him.

programme.title: Maude
programme.desc: Maude plans a dinner party for her friend, U.S. Congresswoman MacIlhaney, and then plans a new job as her assistant. But Maude could never plan on what's yet to come in the first episode of a three-part story.

programme.title: Maude
programme.desc: Maude mourns the moving of her dearest friends the Harmons until the death of someone close has a drastic effect on her mood...and her life...on the second of a three-part episode.

programme.title: Maude
programme.desc: Sparks start flying when the newly appointed U.S. Congresswoman Maude Findlay arrives in Washington D.C., throwing a monkey wrench into the political machinery by insisting upon doing things her way.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: In a protest against unsafe equipment, the cabbies go on strike, and Louie offers an unusual solution to the problem to shop steward Elaine.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: In a hilarious caper, Louie and the cabbies pool all their cash to buy a painting at an auction, planning to cash in big when the artist dies—but when the bidding gets too heavy, the gang turns a dignified auction into a frolicking free-for-all.

programme.title: Taxi

programme.desc: Tensions run high for the 69 new girls as the 18 returning DCC veterans join the competition for a coveted invitation to training camp.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: DCC Training Camp begins tonight at Valley Ranch! The stress for the newly selected training camp candidates is evident as they struggle to re-arrange their schedules and secure new living arrangements in Dallas.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: It's two weeks into training camp, and Kelli and Judy are fixing to make their first cuts. This week's rehearsals are important for all the girls as they are expected to master the world-famous DCC kick line and jump split.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: It's week three of training camp and the rookie candidates are brought in for their DCC "Makeovers." They're given a new look with a hair and make-up revamp and are transformed in the DCC mold.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: Tonight's rehearsal starts with a big bang when DCC Technical Director Kitty Carter makes a surprise visit to Valley Ranch.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: Two young girls in Washington are snatched in broad daylight while riding their bikes; the case goes unsolved for decades, until a new detective with a local connection to the story tries to solve the mystery.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: The investigation into a newlywed's disappearance focuses on her job as a CIA employee as a possible clue.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: Pamela Smart's husband is found murdered; police investigate and discover that Smart is keeping a big secret.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: When young mother and paramedic Annamarie Cochrane Rintala is found dead at the bottom of her basement stairs, it takes four trials and 13 years before justice is served.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: A teen's murder shakes a Nevada community, especially when two unlikely people make confessions.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: Rachel Buffett, whose former fiance, Daniel Wozniak, was convicted of two grisly murders, talks about being at the center of the investigation.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: After Todd Chance is murdered, police follow a trail of video evidence as they work to track down the killer.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: Two young girls in Washington are snatched in broad daylight while riding their bikes; the case goes unsolved for decades, until a new detective with a local connection to the story tries to solve the mystery.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: A father is accused of stealing money from his children's trust funds and murdering his ex-wife to cover up his crimes.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: A man charged with murder claims he was too fat to have committed the crime.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: The residents of a glamorous resort town are shocked when a well-known woman from a prominent family is found dead in her home.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: When two women call 911 after hearing someone break into their apartment, their call for help holds the key to solving the mysterious murder of a young graduate student named Katie Sepich.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: A 40-year-old Minnesota woman is shot to death in her bed while her husband and teenage daughter are home, leaving investigators to wonder who would want her dead.

programme.title: Ibiza Weekender
programme.desc: Things come to a head as Imogen loses her cool and decides to step down as head rep.

programme.title: Ibiza Weekender
programme.desc: Rachael takes up the role of head rep, prompting Jordan to show some interest in her.

programme.title: Ibiza Weekender
programme.desc: Will Jordan and Rachael get together in Imogen's absence?

programme.title: Rock of Love: Don't Threaten Me with a Good Time
programme.desc: Bret Michaels, lead singer of rock band Poison, welcomes 25 young ladies to his rocker lair in the hopes of finding that one special girl he can call his own.

programme.title: Rock of Love: Talk Dirty to Me
programme.desc: With 16 girls all fighting for Bret's affection, tensions are run high and alliances are formed as the ladies try to eliminate each other from the competition for Bret's heart, it's “Good Girls” versus “Bad Girls”.

programme.title: Rock of Love: Motocross
programme.desc: Bret challenges the twelve remaining girls to put the pedal to the metal in a motocross relay race, as they learn to ride, they fall, nearly run people over, and even lose an acrylic nail or two.

programme.title: Rock of Love: Riff it Good
programme.desc: Bret wants a woman with a creative side, so he splits the remaining 10 women in teams of 2 for a music challenge, where the girls write lyrics to one of Bret's tracks then perform the song on stage.

programme.title: Rock of Love: First Annual Bret's Mudbowl
programme.desc: Eight girls remain and Bret wants to see who's willing to get down-n-dirty for him in the First Annual Bret's Mudbowl!

programme.title: Rock of Love: Tour Bus Challenge
programme.desc: The next test is The Tour Bus Challenge where the ladies compete in various challenges all relating to the life on the road, the winner getting a solo date.

programme.title: Rock of Love: Show Me Your Hits
programme.desc: This week Bret has arranged for his remaining “sexy six” to shoot an album cover for his latest release.

programme.title: Rock of Love: Superfan Challenge
programme.desc: Bret is down to his “fabulous five” and he's getting serious about finding the right girl so he calls on three of his super fans to interrogate the ladies, and choose the girl they think is best.

programme.title: Rock of Love: Vegas Baby!
programme.desc: It's time to see who can handle Bret's rock star life on the road, so the final four girls take the tour bus heading to Vegas where Bret has a big show.

programme.title: Rock of Love: Meet the Parents
programme.desc: Only three girls are left in the house and now it's time for their parents to meet Bret.

programme.title: Rock of Love: The Rose & the Thorn
programme.desc: Things heat up when Bret tells the final 2 girls to pack their bikinis ‘cause they're goin' for an exotic getaway to Cabo San Lucas, Mexico!

programme.title: Deal or No Deal
programme.desc: With 26 sealed briefcases full of varying amounts of cash, ranging from a penny to $1m – contestants decide whether to accept an offer of cash from ‘the Banker,’ in exchange for what might be contained in the contestant’s chosen briefcase.

programme.title: Deal or No Deal
programme.desc: With 26 sealed briefcases full of varying amounts of cash, ranging from a penny to $1m – contestants decide whether to accept an offer of cash from ‘the Banker,’ in exchange for what might be contained in the contestant’s chosen briefcase.

programme.title: Deal or No Deal
programme.desc: The contestant picks one case which is theirs to keep. As each of the 25 cases is opened, the likelihood of the player having a valuable cash amount in their case decreases or increases, with ‘the Banker’ tempting the player throughout the game.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: With her degree in jeopardy thanks to her failing grades, and the little issue of a dramatic dorm fire, Paige develops a Banting allergy. She slinks home to Toronto with her tail between her legs – but nobody can know the truth about what happened.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Paige has one goal: to return to her former pre-Banting glory. She’s going to get back to doing what she does best. Everything – and that includes dating. Paige surprises Spinner by asking him out. Nothing serious, just casual.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Marco’s at loose ends with Dylan gone and nothing seems exciting. He and Spinner decide a spring break road trip will break the monotony – but cash is the key.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Alex and her mother Emily are in trouble - Chad, Emily's boyfriend, has run up thousands of dollars in credit card debt and hasn't been paying the rent.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Alex's double life is finally bringing in the cash she wants but hiding everything from everyone is taking a toll on her schoolwork and her connection with Paige.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: The corridors of Degrassi have become a pressure cooker. With an unexpected influx of students from Lakehurst, Degrassi students find themselves facing old enemies and new friends.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Abstinence-pledged Darcy wakes up in a strange bed, screamingly hung-over. Panic-stricken, she tries to piece together the events of the night before. She knows – physically – she had sex, but everything else is a blank.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Paige is ecstatic to have landed herself a gig in the fashion world. If everything goes well, this could turn itself into a brand new career path.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: After seeing Craig’s newly released album on the shelves at the record store, Ashley decides to pursue her own music – starting with a performance at the Lakehurst-Degrassi talent mixer.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Amidst the crowded classrooms and the battle for school territory, tensions between Lakehurst and Degrassi students continue to mount. But Spinner’s got his eye on enemy territory -- the adorably tough new Lakehurst girl, Jane.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Faced with his own aggression and looming mortality, Spinner attempts to prove his ‘masculinity’ by kicking an unnecessary amount of Lakehurst ass.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Manny’s moved back home but the honeymoon between she and her parents is just about over. And when her dad insists she have a traditional “Debut” – the lavish party many Filipino girls have for their 18th birthday – Manny takes a stand.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Ellie’s ex-mentor Caitlin Ryan arrives to do a guest lecture series in Jesse’s class and Ellie sees her opportunity to set herself apart from her peers. She throws herself into Caitlin’s class assignment and her hard work quickly pays off.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Emma decides she’ll do what it takes to get back on track, starting by rekindling her friendship with Manny, but when Manny wants to hit an audition to be a ‘Purple Dragon’ sports drink model, Emma finds herself quickly at odds with her best friend.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Spinner deals with chemo, timing how long he can go between barf-buckets, while his cheerleader Jane, tries to bring the party to him.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Marco and Ellie’s retail therapy goes awry when Marco finds his credit card maxed out. Ellie rescues him this time, but Marco realizes a new job is the real solution—and might even give him the opportunity to meet new people.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Roofie rape victim Darcy is barreling down a self-destructive path and only a handful of people know why.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Manny and Jay’s faux-mance is working perfectly. But when Jay gets too serious, Manny reminds him it's all fake.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: After Manny discovers that her University demo reel is actually a sex tape that she and Jay made, her future hangs in the balance. By the time Jay catches up to her with the correct DVD, it's too late.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: When cute and funny Rachel joins Peter, Danny & Derek’s MI group for their “How-To” video project, confidence is high.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Mia’s finally been granted a spot on Spirit Squad, and she’s ecstatic. But trying to be a normal teenager is proving a difficult balancing act.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Paige is on her A game - she's excelling at work, Andrea's given her a raise, and she’s going to use the money to redesign her bedroom.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Since Snake’s suspension from teaching, Emma’s life has been turned upside-down. He’s really in a funk, and the dark cloud over his head has fouled the air at home, where Emma finds herself caught in the no-man’s-land between her parents.

programme.title: Degrassi Junior High
programme.desc: When the Degrassi Jr. High quiz team goes to Kathleen's house to prepare for a match, they discover that Kathleen's mother is an alcoholic. Rich and Caitlin offer Kathleen their support.

programme.title: Degrassi Junior High
programme.desc: Sick of being confused with her twin sister Heather, Erica is determined to define herself as an individual. She finds an opportunity at the Spring Dance, where she is found passionately kissing a strange boy!

programme.title: Degrassi Junior High
programme.desc: As Stephanie's mother makes plans to remarry and her father continues to fight for custody of her and her brother, Stephanie becomes increasingly despondent. She even starts to talk about suicide.

programme.title: Degrassi Junior High
programme.desc: A group of parents demands that Spike be moved to another school because her pregnancy sets a bad example. Some of the students agree, but Caitlin writes an article for the school newspaper supporting Spike.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Rick decides to get back at his bullies, hitting them right where it hurts – their cars. But when Jimmy becomes a member of the “Whack Your Brain” team, the two form a truce.

programme.title: Living with Dinosaurs
programme.desc: David Attenborough learns that descendants of the dinosaur age are alive and well. David explores how they survived the catastrophes that wiped out other species.

programme.title: Ice Age Giants
programme.desc: Discover the beasts of the Ice Age with Professor Alice Roberts. Alice's adventure begins in the Land of the Sabre-tooth.

programme.title: Ice Age Giants
programme.desc: Alice ventures to the parts of the northern hemisphere hit hardest by the cold - Europe and Siberia. High in the mountains of Transylvania, a cave sealed for thousands of years reveals grisly evidence of a fight to the death.

programme.title: Ice Age Giants
programme.desc: Professor Alice Roberts journeys 40,000 years back in time on the trail of the great beasts of the ice age. This was the last time that giants like mammoths, woolly rhinos and sabre-toothed cats ruled our planet.

programme.title: Ancient Powers
programme.desc: In a brutal world where nature is both friend and foe, the ancient powers are just beginning. They must use all their skill and ingenuity to shape their territory and establish their cultures.

programme.title: Ancient Powers
programme.desc: In an unpredictable world, the ancient powers must lay down the foundations of their societies to show their strength, protect their people and ultimately build their way to glory.

programme.title: Ancient Powers
programme.desc: To pay for armies and other costs, the ancient powers had to tax territories and monetise their assets. But in this world of commerce, ancient societies stored their wealth in different ways.

programme.title: Ancient Powers
programme.desc: In a world where enemies watch for weakness, the ancient powers must use all their strength and cunning to defend their people, conquer new lands, and rise to the challenge of the battlefield.

programme.title: Ancient Powers
programme.desc: In an unruly world, the ancient powers must lead their people, create ways to govern and keep rebellion at bay. To achieve this, they may invent caste systems, organise gladiatorial games or turn to gods.

programme.title: Ancient Powers
programme.desc: Though the ancient powers have endured for centuries, their destruction is close at hand. However, some will leave lasting legacies that will continue to shape the world long after their downfall.

programme.title: Walking with Dinosaurs
programme.desc: In a time when monstrous creatures ruled the earth, South America was the land of the giants. Nigel Marven walks among these gigantic creatures, on a quest to witness the largest predator bringing down the largest prey.

programme.title: Walking with Dinosaurs
programme.desc: Nigel Marven journeys back to the sand dunes of Mesozoic Mongolia to track the owner of the largest claws of all time, the Therizinosaurus. His adventure yields a series of surprising clues, a nest, footprints, dung, and more.

programme.title: Walking with Dinosaurs
programme.desc: Scientists study the perfectly preserved remains of an adolescent allosaurus they call Big Al.

programme.title: Walking with Dinosaurs
programme.desc: This scientific detective story traces the evidence for Big Al the allosaur's existence, using clues from climate change studies, forensics, and fossil records to bring him back to life.

programme.title: The Making Of: Walking With Dinosaurs
programme.desc: Animatronics, computer animation and science re-create the dinosaurs' world.

programme.title: Walking with Dinosaurs: Shortbites
programme.desc: Featured species are the coelophysis and the diplodocus.

programme.title: Bitchin' Rides
programme.desc: The 1941 Chevy is finished in the metal shop and ready for paint.

programme.title: Bitchin' Rides
programme.desc: Dave restores a 1964 Cadillac while adding modern updates.

programme.title: Bitchin' Rides

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog goes on his a case, which involves Bobby, who's been on parole for three months pending sentencing on an assault charge. Bobby's girlfriend wants him back in jail, and Dog agrees that the Bobby needs to be behind bars.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog pursues two people whose lives have been ruined by drugs. First, he tracks Mae, who traded a good home and loving family for an ice pipe. The next case involves Jude. His addiction has caused his pregnant wife to fear for her safety.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog is a rough, tough bounty hunter, but he's a softie at heart, as the two cases in this episode show.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog answers two very different calls for help from women. In the first case, he helps Leland protect Maria, who's being threatened by her violent husband. Then Dog visit a young woman who's dying and has asked to see Dog as one of her final wishes.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Baby Lyssa, who's just turned 18 and is studying to become a bondsman, gets to do some on-the-job training when she helps Dog hunt for Wayne, who's run out on a bond for second-degree assault.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog is sick as a dog, but he still must lead the hunt for a fugitive named James. James' girlfriend tries to cover for him, but Dog surprises James in his bedroom and leads him away in cuffs.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Beth buys Dog a shirt with an embroidered chicken, but Dog explains he only wears shirts with pictures of either Jesus or a Harley-Davidson. When it's time to go to work, the team goes after Necia, a fugitive with felony charges pending.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: It's Christmas day, and Dog sets out to nab Raymond, who robs to support his ice habit, and give him a little Christmas gift - shiny new handcuffs.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog and Beth must go after their former housekeeper, Lisa, who's jumped bond. They know this case will be tricky because Lisa knows everyone in the family. Luckily, Beth's nephew, Jason, is visiting and is quickly put to work as the bait.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Before Tim heads out for a tough day of bounty hunting, he likes to get in a little quality time with his daughter, Summer Rain.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: After giving a rousing speech to an audience of enthusiastic grade-schoolers, Dog catches up with an old friend, Sheriff Tommy Cayetano, to talk business. Dog's got a tough fugitive, named Mia, to catch and Tommy is happy to lend a hand.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog knows very little about Peter, but what he does know, he doesn't like! Not only is he currently facing two counts of second degree sexual assault, about week ago, he dropped out of sight before missing his court date.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: It's the day before Valentine's Day and love is in the air at Da Kine Bail Bonds--but not for Tapi who has failed to appear in court on theft charges. Dog's plan is to have Leland knock on Tapi's door with a Valentine's gift to draw her out.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog and Beth are finally getting married! They've been together for more than ten years, but Dog is determined, as he puts it, to "marry his common law wife the Christian way."

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog, Beth are off to the Big Island for their wedding. They hope to relax for a few days but it turns out Leland has a fugitive he needs to catch and despite the time limit, neither Dog nor Beth can resist the opportunity to catch a fugitive.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog and the team must deal with misleading informants, belligerent boaters, and angry drunks when they go after Kimberly, a traffic offender with over 20 violations. And if that isn't enough, Dog has another problem -- Duane Lee is sick.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: When the team hunts for Steven, a fugitive with a history of domestic abuse, they seek help from his girlfriend, who's been a victim of his abuse. Meanwhile, Beth trains for a 5K race to help raise awareness about domestic abuse.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog is going to be the keynote speaker at the annual Profession Bail Agents convention in Las Vegas, but before he leaves he's got to clear two cases from his docket--Heidi and Stephanie.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Tim's got a big problem. Owen has failed to appear in court. He's on bond for serious drug charges and now Tim could lose $30,000 if he doesn't catch Owen. With Dog's help he tries to track down the co-signer but they come up dry.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: It's been raining for days and the team is going a little stir-crazy, but Dog has the cure; a good hunt. Maui has failed to appear on a drug charge and the team has just one lead. She was recently spotted during a bust at a local chop shop garage.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog decides it's time to outfit the Da Kine crew with new SUVs. After a quick visit to their local dealership, they go after Jasmine, a woman whose criminal record includes over 37 arrests for everything from drug promotion to assault.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog has two fugitives to catch, and he gets help from the unlikeliest sources--the fugitives' mothers. First, Ginger's mother wants to revoke her daughter's bond. Then Brandon's mother decides to revoke his bond because Brandon has an ice habit.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog is back hunting in the big city of Denver, but chasing fugitives on the mainland is more dangerous than ever. So Dog decides that the crew should get pepper-ball guns, which have much better range than pepper spray.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog decides to help two of his bondsmen buddies, Dave "Red" Widhelm and "Downtown" Bobby Brown. First up is Red, who has a client, named Alvin, whose bond is $20,000. Then the team goes after Craig, a client of Bobby's whose bond is almost $70,000.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog leads the team on another adrenaline-filled chase in Denver. The fugitive, Robert, has a habit of address-hopping that makes him a difficult target, but Dog refuses to give up and finally tracks Robert down in his latest hideaway.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Residents of Noel, Missouri were stunned to learn that their bank had been robbed and the bank president was missing. His body was later found floating in a lake, securely bound to a chair with duct tape.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Flu-like symptoms of a mother and her children prove to be something more serious: thallium poisoning. After the mother's death, investigators turn their attention to finding the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A man disappears one year to the day after beginning an affair with his friend's wife. 15 years later, with the help of a metal detector, police find evidence that would prove what had happened and who was responsible.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1999, 9-year-old Valiree Jackson vanished on her way to school near Spokane. Her father, Brad Jackson, reported the disappearance and the entire community started searching for her abductor.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In little more than a month, two women who lived in the same apartment complex were brutally murdered. The similarities of the crime scenes led police to conclude they were dealing with a serial killer who harbored an intense hatred of women.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1988, when a patient dies unexpectedly in the office of California neurologist Richard Boggs, police begin what they think will be a routine investigation. Soon they uncover a bizarre story of corpse stealing, fake identity and sexual perversion.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A young woman was found dead on a golf course in the Bahamas. The grass on that course was so distinctive, it had evidentiary value. The evidence led police to two suspects, each of whom blamed the other.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When a woman and her daughter didn't return home from shopping, her husband directed police to a nearby mall. The child's body was found, but there was no sign of the wife.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Over and Out
programme.desc: When a pipe bomb rips through a rural home, police have no idea who is responsible. A 9-volt battery and the remnants of a mailing label ead investigators to the man who made the bomb.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Within Arm's Reach
programme.desc: A police officer accused of killing his estranged wife insists she committed suicide. Investigators say it was murder — that it was physically impossible for the woman to have shot herself.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A Michigan State University grad student disappeared and was presumed dead. With the help of a professor of geological sciences, police hoped to get the "dirt" on her killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: On Halloween night 2004, Adriane Insogna and Leslie Mazzara were brutally murdered in their Napa, California home.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1996, police received a call from Darlie Routier telling them of her two sons' murders. The police found the killer by analyzing blood spatter, doing behavioral profiling and analyzing Darlie's 911 call.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1984, the body of college student Laura Salmon was found on a Middle Tennessee farm, covered with her own denim jeans as well as the jeans of the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Fire engulfs the home where Lori Keidel and her siblings were left alone while their father went to the laundromat. Years after her mother's disappearance, Lori tells police she witnessed her mother's death.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Women in a Louisiana city live in fear of a rapist who leaves no clues to his identity. But technology and behavioral science combine to give police a new forensic tool. Police narrow their search to one man: local policeman Randy Comeaux.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: The body of 16-year-old Leanne Tiernan was discovered nine months after she disappeared. Forensic scientists found clues that painted a virtual portrait of her killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Two sets of scientists probe a woman's death.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A murder trail turned cold, until police got a call from a woman whose husband, Gerald Powers, had a criminal past and a fondness for Chevy Berettas.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A young woman is found dead in her apartment. With little evidence at the scene, the case turns cold — until police discover a link between their prime suspect and an unsolved murder committed six years earlier in a different state.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A college senior was found raped and murdered near an unpaved footpath used by students to walk from one side of campus to the other.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Authorities track a kidnapper who let his victim write a last will and informed the family of her murder. A phone number written on a previous page left a lasting impression, which helped to convict.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 2005, David Castor suffered a slow, agonizing death over a period of days. His wife maintained it was suicide, even though it was done with antifreeze.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 2000, construction manager Darrell North was found dead in his work trailer in Ft. Worth, Texas. When investigators arrived, they found that he had been stabbed 46 times, indicating a personal relationship between the victim and the attacker.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: On May 20, 2001, Carrie Nelson was beaten to death while working alone in a park office. The case went unsolved for six years. Finally, police found a match with DNA samples gathered from the crime scene.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Digital enhancement of security camera footage shows that what appears to be a casual encounter is actually a forced abduction. When investigators suspect the crimes are not random, they fear a serial killer may be on the loose.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Investigators find a shoe print, several foreign hairs and unknown fingerprints at a murder scene. But they believe the most telling piece of evidence is the bite mark on the victim's chest.

programme.desc: Lucy and Ethel enter a contest for new home furnishings. If they are the lucky winner, they must be home the next day to receive a phone call. Unfortunately Ricky has four tickets to a new musical which he really wants to see.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI
programme.desc: En noviembre de 1994, cuando un vehículo blindado de Wells Fargo desapareció de un centro comercial de Glendale, Arizona, las autoridades locales y el FBI fueron de inmediato a recuperarlo, junto con la carga de casi un millón de dólares.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI
programme.desc: Comenzando en California en 1995, un asesino en serie atacó a varias mujeres vulnerables. Al principio, se mostraba encantador y generoso, y con rapidez se tornaba violento. Era despiadado en sus crímenes y rápido en sus escapes.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI

programme.title: Los nuevos detectives
programme.desc: Las fuerzas de la naturaleza pueden reducir un cuerpo a huesos en semanas. Con una combinación única de arte y ciencia, los antropólogos forenses identifican a las víctimas olvidadas por mucho tiempo.

programme.title: Los nuevos detectives

programme.title: Los nuevos detectives

programme.title: Los nuevos detectives
programme.desc: Cuando una víctima es asesinada a quemarropa, la policía a menudo asume que la culpa es de un amigo o conocido. Después de todo, es difícil para un extraño cometer un ataque tan de cerca.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI

programme.title: People's Court
programme.desc: Joan is taking Sena to court after she gave away 5 cats she asked Sena to care for after Hurricane Sandy.

programme.title: Judge Mathis
programme.desc: After Anthony claims he saw explicit text messages between the defendant and her ex, he's suing for unpaid loans.

programme.title: Judge Mathis
programme.desc: Sara is suing her ex-boyfriend for breach of contract after he let his female friend move in with him.

programme.title: Judge Mathis
programme.desc: Aisha claims Antwan harassed her and posted an explicit photo of her on social media without her permission.

programme.title: Atomic Betty
programme.desc: The evil two feet, three and a half inch tall villain Enormo has a device called the Reverse-Magnifying Ray, that shrinks anything it is zapped with.

programme.title: Atomic Betty
programme.desc: While taking a bath, Maximus is enraged with Minimus, and when he rears up to strike the little creature, Minimus comments that his voice is beautiful, and asking if he had ever considered a singing career.

programme.title: Atomic Betty
programme.desc: The Voice, a new villain, is stealing people's voices across the galaxy. Can Betty stop him in time before she loses her own voice? On Earth, Betty's school is having a charity dance competition.

programme.title: Atomic Betty
programme.desc: Maximus springs his father, a petty thief, out of jail. Max Sr. quickly reunites his old gang and Betty must stop the evil Maximuses from the biggest heist of all, stealing the Golden Yolk.

programme.title: Atomic Betty
programme.desc: The Chameleon wants to give Maximus something he's always wanted for Christmas—the destruction of Atomic Betty!

programme.title: Atomic Betty
programme.desc: Betty and the crew have an important mission—towing the incredibly large Querzanian Diamond across a dangerous galaxy in order to avoid galactic warfare—but Sparky has gone on a cruise for vacation.

programme.title: Atomic Betty
programme.desc: When Minimus' head gets stuck on "nasty", he turns into a raging monster that may prove to be a formidable foe for Betty. Meanwhile, on Earth, Betty and Paloma meet Noah's parents as we learn more about them as to their strange careers.

programme.title: Atomic Betty
programme.desc: Maximus infects Betty with a love bug, and she instantly falls in love with Minimus. The bug's hitch a ride back to Earth, and the whole town erupts in Valentine's Day madness!

programme.title: Atomic Betty
programme.desc: In space, a small gnarly imp-like creature named Jinx steals all of the galaxy's good luck, leaving nothing but bad luck in his wake. On Earth, Betty is concerned Penelope and Paloma may be becoming friends.

programme.title: Atomic Betty
programme.desc: Betty helps Noah with his training but is turned into a baby by Infantor. Noah uses his new skills and an army of babies to save the day.

programme.title: Atomic Betty
programme.desc: Betty discovers that everyone, including Chaz, Noah, Duncan, and the Osborne twins, are flocking to downtown Moose Jaw in an attempt to be cast as extras in a new Hollywood space flick, starring starlet Delta Aurora as a space heroine.

programme.title: Atomic Betty
programme.desc: Betty has been invited to Noah's place, where he is about to demonstrate to her a satellite radio (that inadvertently eavesdrops on Admiral DeGill's personal activities). Leaving, she sees Paloma being chased by Duncan as a result of a prank.

programme.title: Atomic Betty
programme.desc: Spindly Tam asks Betty to protect the Beluvian Demon Box, which houses a powerful demon. A "Mad Max" style race unfolds as Maximus, Dr. Cerebral, and Pontifadora all pursue the box.

programme.title: Atomic Betty
programme.desc: An alien creature finds its way into Moosejaw Lake, and the town goes crazy trying to get a look at their very own lake monster: "Moosie". / An evil witch uses a powerful mirror to trap the townspeople and unleash their mirror opposites.

programme.title: Rainbow Rangers
programme.desc: A backyard feeder is too close to a glass window and the Rangers need to find another way to safely feed the birds. When the Rangers jump in to save animals from a forest fire, they jump the gun and accidentally put out a controlled burn.

programme.title: Rainbow Rangers
programme.desc: The Rangers save a lemur, and teach Preston Praxton about terraced farming. The Rangers save a lake from invasive zebra mussels.

programme.title: Rainbow Rangers
programme.desc: The Rangers have to reunite a gorilla family separated by a flash flood. / The Rangers have to save cows from a wildfire.

programme.title: Rainbow Rangers
programme.desc: The Rangers help a kaleidoscope of butterflies migrate to their new home in Mexico. / The Rangers try to save a mother horse from a sinkhole... but end up falling in themselves.

programme.title: Rainbow Rangers
programme.desc: The Rangers have to save a forest from destruction. / The Rangers have to save a turtle caught in a fishing net.

programme.title: Rainbow Rangers
programme.desc: The Rangers save a lost puppy stuck in a city sewer system. / When Priscilla removes pesky seed-spitting tree goats from her argan orchard, the goats go hungry and her crop diminishes without the goats' assistance in regeneration.

programme.title: Superhero Kindergarten
programme.desc: A trip to meet Mr. Arnold's friends Penn and Teller leads to a magical mystery that only the Super K's can solve: what happened to Houdini's Ring?

programme.title: Superhero Kindergarten
programme.desc: When Mr. Arnold misses class to attend a Retired Superhero meeting, the new substitute teaches the Super K's a lesson on trusting their instincts.

programme.title: Superhero Kindergarten

programme.title: Superhero Kindergarten

programme.title: Superhero Kindergarten

programme.title: Superhero Kindergarten

programme.title: Chop Chop Ninja
programme.desc: Iro thinks the secret to being a great Chop Chop ninja lies within a fancy ancient book he found. To prove him wrong, Master Enoki sends him, and his friends, on a simple mission: deliver a letter!

programme.title: Chop Chop Ninja
programme.desc: After suffering an especially humiliating defeat, the General quits being evil and opens a chicken restaurant. Iro is the only person in town who believes it is just another evil ploy and will stop at nothing to prove it!

programme.title: Chop Chop Ninja
programme.desc: Determined to win a TV show's “Prank of the Year” award, Neeko teams up with Fishman and the General to unleash a mega prank on the whole city. Neeko discovers too late that the General isn't the prankster he thought he was.

programme.title: LEGO Jurassic World
programme.desc: Rock star mathematician Ian Malcolm returns to Isla Nublar and helps Claire, Owen, and Hudson deal with strange power surges all over Jurassic World.

programme.title: LEGO Jurassic World
programme.desc: A Dilophosaurus runs loose in the park's hotel, and Owen and Claire must find it before the guests notice ... and before Vic's dino-hunting security team can damage the hotel and the guests!

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago Dragons Rising: To Mysterium
programme.desc: Cole, Zane and Bonzle travel to Mysterium, only to fall into Dorama's trap; Arin is frustrated with his Spinjitzu training.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago Dragons Rising: Fugitives From Madness

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago Dragons Rising: Secrets of the Wyldness
programme.desc: When Rontu and Egalt turn to stone, Lloyd's visions lead the ninja to Wyldness. There, the ninja seek shelter in the sorceress's warehouse. Cole and Zane fight against the administration and allow Bonzle, Sprite and Gandalaria to escape.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
